Connect GovernanceDomains cards to real data files
Build full domain detail pages with routing
Fix build errors — AtrocitiesTimeline SourceCitationModal props and vite.config manualChunks
tasks.description: AtrocitiesTimeline was passing extra properties (id, descriptionTa, source, domain) to SourceCitationModal that don't exist on StatSource interface. Also vite.config.ts manualChunks object literal didn't match Rollup's expected function signature. Both fixed by CEO.
notes: Fixed by CEO — 2026-Apr-17-02-01pm. Build was broken (2 TS errors). Now clean: tsc passes, vite build succeeds, 32/32 tests pass.

tasks.title: Add SEO meta tags and Open Graph data
tasks.description: Add react-helmet-async. Set page title, description, OG image, Twitter card meta for homepage and each domain page. Tamil and English meta descriptions. OG image should be a powerful TVK branded image.
notes: Sprint 3 — SEO is critical for shareability on WhatsApp and Twitter.

Completed by CEO — 2026-Apr-17-03-15pm. Added react-helmet-async. index.html has base OG/Twitter meta. HomePage has bilingual Helmet. DomainPage has per-domain Helmet with headline stat as description.

tasks.title: Add lazy loading and code splitting for domain pages
tasks.description: Use React.lazy and Suspense for DomainPage, AtrocitiesTimeline, TVKVisionSection, and ChartWrapper. Add loading skeletons. This reduces initial bundle size — charts chunk alone is 390KB.
notes: Sprint 3 — performance. Charts chunk is 390KB, animations 133KB. Lazy load these.

Completed by CEO — 2026-Apr-17-03-15pm. React.lazy for AtrocitiesTimeline, TVKVisionSection, DomainPage. Suspense with spinner skeleton. Build confirms separate chunks: AtrocitiesTimeline 22KB, TVKVisionSection 9KB, DomainPage 16KB.

tasks.title: Build About TVK / Join page
tasks.description: Create /about page with: TVK party history, Vijay's vision statement, how to join TVK, volunteer form (name, phone, district, ward). Mobile-first, bilingual. GSAP entrance animations. Include party symbol and flag prominently.
notes: Sprint 3 — conversion page. After showing anger and hope, give people a way to ACT.

tasks.title: Add accessibility audit and fixes
tasks.description: Audit all components for WCAG 2.1 AA: keyboard navigation, focus management, ARIA labels on interactive elements, color contrast ratios, screen reader announcements for animated counters. Fix any issues found.
notes: Sprint 3 — inclusivity. A political manifesto must be accessible to everyone.

tasks.title: Add test coverage for AtrocitiesTimeline, TVKVisionSection, DomainPage
tasks.description: Write Vitest + React Testing Library tests for the three newest components. Test: rendering, data display from real data files, modal interactions, bilingual content. Target: maintain 100% test file coverage.
notes: Sprint 3 — testing. New components from Sprint 2 don't have dedicated tests yet.

tasks.title: Research Women's Safety and Social Justice statistics
tasks.description: Compile NCRB and government data on: crimes against women in TN (trends 2015-2023), domestic violence rates, POCSO cases, SC/ST atrocity cases, social justice budget allocations, reservation implementation gaps. Every stat sourced from government portals.
notes: Sprint 3 — expanding data coverage. Women's safety is a critical domain missing from our 6-domain coverage.
